layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Self-efficacy: Toward a Unifying Theory of Behavioral Change

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The present article presents an integrative theoretical framework to explain

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and to predict psychological changes achieved by different modes of treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: This theory states that psychological procedures, whatever their form, alter the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: level and strength of self-eficacy. It is hypothesized that expectations of per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sonal effcacy determine whether coping behavior will be initiated, how much

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effort will be expended, and how long it will be sustained in the face of ob-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stacles and aversive experiences. Persistence in activities that are subjectively

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threatening but in fact relatively safe produces, through experiences of mastery,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: further enhancement of self-efficacy and corresponding reductions in defensive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior. In the proposed model, expectations of personal efficacy are derived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from four principal sources of information: performance accomplishments,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vicarious experience, verbal persuasion, and physiological states. The more de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pendable the experiential sources, the greater are the changes in perceived self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. A number of factors are identified as influencing the cognitive processing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of efficacy information arising from enactive, vicarious, exhortative, and emotive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sources. The differential power of diverse therapeutic procedures is analyzed in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: terms of the postulated cognitive mechanism of operation. Findings are reported

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from microanalyses of enactive, vicarious, and emotive modes of treatment that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: support the hypothesized relationship between perceived self-efficacy and be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havioral changes. Possible directions for further research are discussed.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Current developments in the field of be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havioral change reflect two major divergent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trends. The difference is especially evident in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the treatment of dysfunctional inhibitions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and defensive behavior. On the one hand, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mechanisms by which human behavior is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: acquired and regulated are increasingly for-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mulated in terms of cognitive processes. On

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the other hand, it is performance-based pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cedures that are proving to be most powerful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: for effecting psychological changes. As a con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sequence, successful performance is replacing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: symbolically based experiences as the prin-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ciple vehicle of change.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The present article presents the view that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: changes achieved by different methods derive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from a common cognitive mechanism. The

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: apparent divergence of theory and practice

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: can be reconciled by postulating that cogni-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tive processes mediate change but that cog-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nitive events are induced and altered most

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: readily by experience of mastery arising from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effective performance. The distinction be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tween process and means is underscored, be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cause it is often assumed that a cognitive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mode of operation requires a symbolic means

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of induction. Psychological changes can be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produced through other means than per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance accomplishments. Therefore, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: explanatory mechanism developed in this

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: article is designed to account for changes in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior resulting from diverse modes of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Psychological treatments based on learning

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: principles were originally conceptualized to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior was presumably shaped automat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ically by its effects. Contingency learning

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: operate through peripheral mechanisms. New

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through paired stimulation was construed in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: structed from observing the effects of one's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions rather than from the examples pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vided by others.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Learning from response consequences is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: also conceived of largely as a cognitive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: process. Consequences serve as an unarticu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lated way of informing performers what they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: must do to gain beneficial outcomes and to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: avoid punishing ones. By observing the dif-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ferential effects of their own actions, in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: propriate in which settings and behave ac-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cordingly (Dulany, 1968). Viewed from the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cognitive framework, learning from differ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ential outcomes becomes a special case of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: observational learning. In this mode of con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: veying response information, the conception

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the appropriate behavior is gradually con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dividuals discern which responses are ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Changes in behavior produced by stimuli

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that either signify events to come or indicate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: probable response consequences also have

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: been shown to rely heavily on cognitive rep-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: resentations of contingencies. People are not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: much affected by paired stimulation unless

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they recognize that the events are correlated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Dawson & Furedy, 1976; Grings, 1973).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Stimuli influence the likelihood of a be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior's being performed by virtue of their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: predictive function, not because the stimuli

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are automatically connected to responses by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their having occurred together. Reinterpreta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion of antecedent determinants as predictive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cues, rather than as controlling stimuli, has

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: shifted the locus of the regulation of be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior from the stimulus to the individual.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: connectionist terms as a process in which re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sponses were linked directly to stimuli. Al-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tering the rate of preexisting behavior by re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: inforcement was portrayed as a process

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: wherein responses were regulated by their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: immediate consequences without requiring

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: any conscious involvement of the responders.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Growing evidence from several lines of re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: search altered theoretical perspectives on how

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior is acquired and regulated. Theo-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: retical formulations emphasizing peripheral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mechanisms began to give way to cognitively

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: oriented theories that explained behavior in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: terms of central processing of direct, vicari-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ous, and symbolic sources of information.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Detailed analysis of the empirical and con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ceptual issues (see Bandura, 1977) falls

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: beyond the scope of the present article. To

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: summarize briefly, however, it has now been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: amply documented that cognitive processes

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: play a prominent role in the acquisition and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: retention of new behavior patterns. Transitory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiences leave lasting effects by being

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: coded and retained in symbols for memory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: representation. Because acquisition of re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sponse information is a major aspect of learn-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing, much human behavior is developed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through modeling. From observing others, one

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: forms a conception of how new behavior pat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: terns are performed, and on later occasions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the symbolic construction serves as a guide

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: for action (Bandura, 1971). The initial ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proximations of response patterns learned

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: observationally are further refined through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-corrective adjustments based on informa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tive feedback from performance.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The issue of the locus at which behavioral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determinants operate applies to reinforce-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment influences as well as to antecedent en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vironmental stimuli. Contrary to the common

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: view that behavior is controlled by its im-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mediate consequences, behavior is related to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: its outcomes at the level of aggregate con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sequences rather than momentary effects

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Baum, 1973). People process and synthesize

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: feedback information from sequences of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: events over long intervals about the situa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tional circumstances and the patterns and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rates of actions that are necessary to produce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: given outcomes. Since consequences affect be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior through the influence of thought, be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: liefs about schedules of reinforcement can

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exert greater influence on behavior than the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reinforcement itself (Baron, Kaufman, &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Stauber, 1969; Kaufman, Baron, & Kopp,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1966). Incidence of behavior that has been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: positively reinforced does not increase if in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dividuals believe, based on other information,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that the same actions will not be rewarded

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on future occasions (Estes, 1972); and the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: same consequences can increase, reduce, or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: have no effect on incidence of behavior de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pending on whether individuals are led to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: believe that the consequences signify correct

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: responses, incorrect responses, or occur non-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contingently (Dulany, 1968).

layout_dets.text: Efficacy Expectations as a Mechanism of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Operation

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: role of cognition in the acquisition and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: regulation of behavior. Motivation, which is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: primarily concerned with activation and per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sistence of behavior, is also partly rooted in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cognitive activities. The capacity to repre-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sent future consequences in thought provides

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one cognitively based source of motivation.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Through cognitive representation of future out-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: comes individuals can generate current mo-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tivators of behavior. Seen from this per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: spective, reinforcement operations affect be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior largely by creating expectations that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behaving in a certain way will produce antici-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pated benefits or avert future difficulties

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Bolles, 1972b). In the enhancement of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: previously learned behavior, reinforcement is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conceived of mainly as a motivational de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vice rather than as an automatic response

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: strengthener.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A second cognitively based source of mo-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tivation operates through the intervening in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fuences of goal setting and self-evaluative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reactions (Bandura, 1976b, 1977). Self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: motivation involves standards against which

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to evaluate performance. By making self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rewarding reactions conditional on attaining a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: certain level of behavior, individuals create

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-inducements to persist in their efforts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: until their performances match self-prescribed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: standards. Perceived negative discrepancies

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: between performance and standards create

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dissatisfactions that motivate corrective

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: changes in behavior. Both the anticipated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: satisfactions of desired accomplishments and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the negative appraisals of insufficient per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance thus provide incentives for action.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Having accomplished a given level of per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance, individuals often are no longer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: satisfied with it and make further self-reward

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contingent on higher attainments.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The reconceptualization of human learn-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing and motivation in terms of cognitive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: processes has major implications for the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mechanisms through which therapeutic pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cedures alter behavioral functioning. Al-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: though the advances in cognitive psychology

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are a subject of increasing interest in specu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: few new theories of psychotherapy have been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proposed that might prove useful in stimu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lating research on explanatory mechanisms

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lations about behavioral change processes,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: An outcome expectancy is defined as a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: person's estimate that a given behavior will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lead to certain outcomes. An efficacy ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectation is the conviction that one can

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: successfully execute the behavior required to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produce the outcomes. Outcome and effcacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations are differentiated, because in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dividuals can believe that a particular course

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of action will produce certain outcomes, but

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: if they entertain serious doubts about whether

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they can perform the necessary activities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: such information does not influence their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and in integrating the results accompanying

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: diverse modes of treatment. The present

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: article outlines a theoretical framework, in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which the concept of self-eficacy is assigned

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a central role, for analyzing changes achieved

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in fearful and avoidant behavior. The ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: planatory value of this conceptual system

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is then evaluated by its ability to predict

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral changes produced through dif-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ferent methods of treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The present theory is based on the prin-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cipal asssumption that psychological pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cedures, whatever their form, serve as means

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of creating and strengthening expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of personal efficacy. Within this analysis,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy expectations are distinguished from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: response-outcome expectancies. The differ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ence is presented schematically in Figure 1.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In this conceptual system, expectations of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: personal mastery affect both initiation and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: persistence of coping behavior. The strength

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of people's convictions in their own effective-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ness is likely to affect whether they will even

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: try to cope with given situations. At this

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: initial level, perceived self-efficacy influences

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The preceding analysis of how perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy influences performance is not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: meant to imply that expectation is the sole

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determinant of behavior. Expectation alone

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will not produce desired performance if the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: component capabilities are lacking. Moreover,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: there are many things that people can do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with certainty of success that they do not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perform because they have no incentives

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to do so. Given appropriate skills and ade-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: quate incentives, however, efficacy expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions are a major determinant of people's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: choice of activities, how much effort they will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expend, and of how long they will sustain

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effort in dealing with stressful situations.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Not only can perceived self-efficacy have

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: directive influence on choice of activities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and settings, but, through expectations of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: eventual success, it can affect coping efforts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: once they are initiated. Efficacy expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determine how much effort people will ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pend and how long they will persist in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: face of obstacles and aversive experiences.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The stronger the perceived self-efficacy, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: more active the efforts. Those who persist in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subjectively threatening activities that are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in fact relatively safe will gain corrective

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiences that reinforce their sense of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy, thereby eventually eliminating their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: defensive behavior. Those who cease their cop-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing efforts prematurely will retain their self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: debilitating expectations and fears for a long

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: time.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Efficacy expectations vary on several di-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mensions that have important performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: implications. They differ in magnitude. Thus

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: when tasks are ordered in level of difficulty,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the efficacy expectations of different individ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: uals may be limited to the simpler tasks, ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tend to moderately difficult ones, or include

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: even the most taxing performances. Efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations also differ in generality. Some

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiences create circumscribed mastery ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations. Others instill a more generalized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sense of efficacy that extends well beyond the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: specific treatment situation. In addition,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectancies vary in strength. Weak expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions are easily extinguishable by discon-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: firming experiences, whereas individuals who

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: possess strong expectations of mastery will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: persevere in their coping efforts despite dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: confirming experiences.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sonal mastery. Moreover, expectations are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: usually assessed globally only at a single

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: point in a change process as though they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: represent a static, unidimensional factor.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Participants in experiments of this type are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: simply asked to judge how much they expect

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to benefit from a given procedure. When

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: asked to make such estimates, participants

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assume, more often than not, that the benefits

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will be produced by the external ministra-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions rather than gained through the de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: velopment of self-efficacy. Such global mea-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sures reflect a mixture of, among other things,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hope, wishful thinking, belief in the potency

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the procedures, and faith in the therapist.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: It therefore comes as no surprise that out-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: come expectations of this type have little

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relation to magnitude of behavioral change

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Davison & Wilson, 1973, Lick & Bootzin,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: An adequate expectancy analysis, there-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fore, requires detailed assessment of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: magnitude, generality, and strength of ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ficacy expectations commensurate with the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: precision with which behavioral processes are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: measured. Both efficacy expectations and per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance should be assessed at significant

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: junctures in the change process to clarify

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their reciprocal effects on each other. Mastery

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations influence performance and are,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in turn, altered by the cumulative effects of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one's efforts.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: choice of behavioral settings. People fear and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tend to avoid threatening situations they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: believe exceed their coping skills, whereas

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they get involved in activities and behave

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assuredly when they judge themselves cap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: able of handling situations that would other-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: wise be intimidating.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Empirical tests of the relationship between

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectancy and performance of threatening

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: activities have been hampered by inadequacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the expectancy analysis. In most studies

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the measures of expectations are mainly con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cerned with people's hopes for favorable out-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: comes rather than with their sense of per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Dimensions of Efficacy Expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: because it is based on personal mastery ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periences. Successes raise mastery expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions; repeated failures lower them, par-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ticularly if the mishaps occur early in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: course of events. After strong efficacy ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations are developed through repeated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: success, the negative impact of occasional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: failures is likely to be reduced. Indeed, oc-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: casional failures that are later overcome by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determined effort can strengthen self-moti-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vated persistence if one finds through ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perience that even the most difficult ob-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stacles can be mastered by sustained effort.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The effects of failure on personal efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: therefore partly depend on the timing and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the total pattern of experiences in which the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: failures occur.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Sources of Efficacy Expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: EFFICACY EXPECTATIONS

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Performance accomplishments. This source

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of efficacy information is especially influential

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Once established, enhanced self-efficacy tends

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to generalize to other situations in which

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance was self-debilitated by pre-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: occupation with personal inadequacies (Ban-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dura, Adams, & Beyer, in press; Bandura,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Jeffery, & Gajdos, 1975). As a result, im-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: provements in behavioral functioning transfer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not only to similar situations but to activities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that are substantially different from those on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which the treatment was focused. Thus, for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: example, increased self-efficacy gained through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rapid mastery of a specific animal phobia can

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In this social learning analysis, expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions of personal efficacy are based on four

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: major sources of information: performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: accomplishments, vicarious experience, verbal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: persuasion, and physiological states. Figure 2

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: presents the diverse influence procedures

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: commonly used to reduce defensive behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and presents the principal source through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which each treatment operates to create

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations of mastery. Any given method,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: depending on how it is applied, may of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: course draw to a lesser extent on one or more

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other sources of efficacy information. For ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ample, as we shall see shortly, performance-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: based treatments not only promote be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havioral accomplishments but also extinguish

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fear arousal, thus authenticating self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through enactive and arousal sources of in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formation. Other methods, however, provide

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fewer ways of acquiring information about

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one's capability for coping with threatening

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: situations. By postulating a common mecha-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nism of operation, this analysis provides a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conceptual framework within which to study

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral changes achieved by different

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modes of treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Figure 2. Major sources of efficacy information and the principal sources through which different

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modes of treatment operate.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The participant modeling approach to the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: elimination of defensive behavior utilizes

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: successful performance as the primary vehicle

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of psychological change. People displaying

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intractable fears and inhibitions are not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: about to do what they dread. In implement-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing participant modeling, therapists therefore

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: structure the environment so that clients can

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perform successfully despite their incapaci-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ties. This is achieved by enlisting a variety of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: response induction aids, including preliminary

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modeling of threatening activities, graduated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tasks, enactment over graduated temporal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intervals, joint performance with the thera-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pist, protective aids to.reduce the likelihood

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of feared consequences, and variation in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: severity of the threat itself (Bandura, Jeffery,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: & Wright, 1974). As treatment progresses,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Methods of change that operate on the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: basis of performance accomplishments convey

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy information in more ways than simply

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through the evidence of performance im-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: provements. In the course of treatments em-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ploying modeling with guided performance,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: participants acquire a generalizable skill for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dealing successfully with stressful situations,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a skill that they use to overcome a variety of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dysfunctional fears and inhibitions in their ev-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: eryday life (Bandura et al., in press; Bandura

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: et al., 1975). Having a serviceable coping

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: skill at one's disposal undoubtedly contributes

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to one's sense of personal efficacy. Behavioral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capabilities can also be enhanced through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modeling alone (Bandura, 1971; Flanders,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1968). However, participant modeling pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vides additional opportunities for translating

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral conceptions to appropriate actions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and for making corrective refinements toward

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the perfection of skills.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Sherman, 1972; Strahley, 1966). Physiolog-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ical measures yield similar results. Symbolic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: desensitization reduces autonomic responses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to imagined but not to actual threats, whereas

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance desensitization eliminates auto-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nomic responses to both imagined and actual

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threats (Barlow, Leitenberg, Agras, & Wincze,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1969). The substantial benefits of successful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance are typically achieved in less

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: time than is required to extinguish arousal to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: symbolic representations of threats.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: increase coping efforts in social situations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as well as reduce fears of other animals.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: However, the generalization effects occur

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: most predictably to the activities that are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: most similar to those in which self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: was restored by treatment (Bandura, Blanch-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ard, & Ritter, 1969).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Most of the treatment procedures de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: veloped in recent years to eliminate fearful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and defensive behavior have been imple-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mented either through performance or by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: symbolic procedures. Regardless of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: methods involved, results of comparative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: studies attest to the superiority of perform-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ance-based treatments. In the desensitization

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: approach devised by Wolpe (1974), clients

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: receive graduated exposure to aversive events

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in conjunction with anxiety reducing ac-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tivities, usually in the form of muscular

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relaxation. A number of experiments have

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: been reported in which relaxation is paired

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with scenes in which phobics visualize

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves engaging in progressively more

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threatening activities or with enactment of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the same hierarchy of activities with the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actual threats. Findings based on different

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: types of phobias consistently reveal that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance desensitization produces sub-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stantially greater behavioral change than does

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: symbolic desensitization (LoPicollo, 1970;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: More recently, avoidance behavior has

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: been treated by procedures involving massive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exposure to aversive events. In this approach,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intense anxiety is elicited by prolonged ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: posure to the most threatening situations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and sustained at high levels, without relief,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: until emotional reactions are extinguished.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Several investigators have compared the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relative success of prolonged exposure to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: aversive situations in imagery and actual en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: counters with them in ameliorating chronic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: agoraphobias. Real encounters with threats

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produce results decidely superior to imagined

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exposure, which has weak, variable effects

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Emmelkamp & Wessels, 1975; Stern &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Marks, 1973; Watson, Mullett, & Pillay,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1973). Prolonged encounters that ensure be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havioral improvements are more effective

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: than distributed brief encounters that are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: likely to end before successful performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the activity is achieved (Rabavilas,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Boulougouris, & Stefanis, 1976).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The findings summarized above are con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sistent with self-efficacy theory, but they do

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not shed much light on the mechanism by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which specific mastery experiences produce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generalized and enduring changes in behavior.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Verification of the operative mechanism re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: quires experimental evidence that experienced

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mastery does in fact alter the level and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: strength of self-efficacy and that self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is, in turn, linked to behavior. We shall re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: turn later to research that addresses itself

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: specifically to the linkages between treat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment procedures, perceived self-efficacy, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The pattern of results reported above of-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fers at least suggestive support for the view

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that exemplifications of success through sus-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Participant modeling has been compared

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with various symbolically based treatments.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: These studies corroborate the superiority of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: successful performance facilitated by model-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing as compared to vicarious experience alone

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Bandura et al., 1969; Blanchard, 1970b;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Lewis, 1974; Ritter, 1969; Röper, Rachman,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: & Marks, 1975), to symbolic desensitization

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Bandura et al., 1969; Litvak, 1969), and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to imaginal modeling in which clients visual-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ize themselves or others coping successfully

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with threats (Thase & Moss, 1976). When

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: participant modeling is subsequently ad-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ministered to those who benefit only par-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tially from the symbolic procedures, avoid-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ance behavior is thoroughly eliminated within

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a brief period.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A number of modeling variables that are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: apt to affect expectations of personal efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: have been shown to enhance the disinhibiting

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: influence of modeling procedures. Phobics

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: benefit more from seeing models overcome

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their difficulties by determined effort than

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from observing facile performances by adept

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: models (Kazdin, 1973; Meichenbaum, 1971).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Showing the gains achieved by effortful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: coping behavior not only minimizes for ob-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: servers the negative impact of temporary

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: distress but demonstrates that even the most

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: anxious can eventually succeed through per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: severance. Similarity to the model in other

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: characteristics, which increases the personal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relevance of vicariously derived information,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: can likewise enhance the effectiveness of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: symbolic modeling (Kazdin, 1974b).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Modeled behavior with clear outcomes

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: conveys more efficacy information than if the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effects of the modeled actions remain am-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: biguous. In investigations of vicarious pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cesses, observing one perform activities that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: meet with success does, indeed, produce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: greater behavioral improvements than wit-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nessing the same performances modeled with-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: out any evident consequences (Kazdin, 1974c,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1975). Diversified modeling, in which the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: activities observers regard as hazardous are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: repeatedly shown to be safe by a variety of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: models, is superior to exposure to the same

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performances by a single model (Bandura &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: If people of widely differing characteristics

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: can succeed, then observers have a reason-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: able basis for increasing their own sense of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the supplementary aids are withdrawn so

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that clients cope effectively unassisted. Self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: directed mastery experiences are then ar-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ranged to reinforce a sense of personal ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ficacy. Through this form of treatment in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capacitated people rapidly lose their fears,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they are able to engage in activities they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formerly inhibited, and they display general-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ized reductions of fears toward threats

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: beyond the specifically treated conditions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Bandura, 1976a).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Vicarious experience. People do not rely on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experienced mastery as the sole source of in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formation concerning their level of self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. Many expectations are derived from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vicarious experience. Seeing others perform.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threatening activities without adverse con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sequences can generate expectations in ob-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intensify and persist in their efforts. They

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: servers that they too will improve if they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: persuade themselves that if others can do it,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they should be able to achieve at least some

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: improvement in performance (Bandura &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Barab, 1973). Vicarious experience, relying

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as it does on inferences from social com-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: parison, is a less dependable source of in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formation about one's capabilities than is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: direct evidence of personal accomplishments.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Consequently, the effcacy expectations in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duced by modeling alone are likely to be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: weaker and more vulnerable to change.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Verbal persuasion. In attempts to influence

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: human behavior, verbal persuasion is widely

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: used because of its ease and ready avail-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ability. People are led, through suggestion,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into believing they can cope successfully with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: what has overwhelmed them in the past.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Efficacy expectations induced in this manner

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are also likely to be weaker than those arising

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from one's own accomplishments because

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they do not provide an authentic experiential

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: base for them. In the face of distressing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threats and a long history of failure in coping

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with them, whatever mastery expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are induced by suggestion can be readily

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: extinguished by disconfirming experiences.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Results of several lines of research attest

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to the limitation of procedures that attempt

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to instill outcome expectations in people

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: simply by telling them what to expect. In

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: laboratory studies, "placebo" conditions de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: signed suggestively to raise expectations of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: improvement produce little change in re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fractory behavior (Lick & Bootzin, 1975;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Moore, 1965; Paul, 1966). Whether this is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: due to the low credibility of the suggestions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or to the weakness of the induced expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions cannot be determined from these stud-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ies, because the expectations were not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: measured.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Numerous experiments have been con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ducted in which phobics receive desensitiza-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion treatment without any expectancy in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formation or with suggestions that it is either

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: highly efficacious or ineffective. The differ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ential outcome expectations are verbally in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duced prior to, during, or immediately after

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatment in the various studies. The findings

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generally show that desensitization reduces

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: phobic behavior, but the outcome expectancy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: manipulations have either no effect or weak,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: inconsistent ones (Howlett & Nawas, 1971;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: McGlynn & Mapp, 1970; McGlynn, Mealiea,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: & Nawas, 1969; McGlynn, Reynolds, &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Linder, 1971). As in the "placebo"" studies, it

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is difficult to make conclusive interpretations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: because the outcome expectations induced

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: suggestively are not measured prior to the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: assessment of behavior changes, if at all.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Simply informing participants that they will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or will not benefit from treatment does not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mean that they necessarily believe what they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are told, especially when it contradicts their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other personal experiences. Moreover, in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: studies just cited the verbal influence is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: aimed mainly at raising outcome expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rather than at enhancing self-efficacy. It is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: changes on the latter dimension that are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: most relevant to the theory under dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cussion.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Emotional arousal. Stressful and taxing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: situations generally elicit emotional arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that, depending on the circumstances, might

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: have informative value concerning personal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: competency. Therefore, emotional arousal is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: another constituent source of information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that can affect perceived self-efficacy in cop-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing with threatening situations. People rely

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: partly on their state of physiological arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in judging their anxiety and vulnerability to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stress. Because high arousal usually debili-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tates performance, individuals are more likely

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to expect success when they are not beset

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by aversive arousal than if they are tense

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and viscerally agitated. Fear reactions gen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Although social persuasion alone may have

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: definite limitations as a means of creating an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: enduring sense of personal efficacy, it can

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contribute to the successes achieved through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: corrective performance. That is, people who

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are socially persuaded that they possess the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capabilities to master difficult situations and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are provided with provisional aids for ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fective action are likely to mobilize greater

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effort than those who receive only the per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance aids. However, to raise by per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: suasion expectations of personal competence

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: without arranging conditions to facilitate ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fective performance will most likely lead to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: failures that discredit the persuaders and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: further undermine the recipients' perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy. It is therefore the interactive, as

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: well as the independent, effects of social

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: persuasion on self-efficacy that merit experi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mental consideration.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tained effort with substantiating comparative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: information can enhance observers' percep-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions of their own performance capabilities.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Research will be presented below that bears

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: more directly on the proposition that model-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing procedures alter avoidance behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through the intervening influence of efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: erate further fear of impending stressful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: situations through anticipatory self-arousal.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: By conjuring up fear-provoking thoughts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: about their ineptitude, individuals can rouse

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves to elevated levels of anxiety that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: far exceed the fear experienced during the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actual threatening situation.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Diminishing emotional arousal can reduce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: avoidance behavior, but different theories

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: posit different explanatory mechanisms for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the observed effects. In the theory from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which the emotive treatments are derived,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: emotional arousal is conceived of as a drive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that activates avoidance behavior. This view

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stresses the energizing function of arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and the reinforcing function of arousal re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duction. Social learning theory, on the other

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hand, emphasizes the informative function

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of physiological arousal. Simply acknowledg-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing that arousal is both informative and mo-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tivating by no means resolves the issue in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dispute, because these are not necessarily two

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: separate effects that somehow jointly produce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior. Rather, the cognitive appraisal of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arousal to a large extent determines the level

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and direction of motivational inducements

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to action. Certain cognitive appraisals of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one's physiological state might be energizing,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: whereas other appraisals of the same state

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: might not (Weiner, 1972). Moreover, many

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: forms of physiological arousal are generated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cognitively by arousing trains of thought.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: When motivation is conceptualized in terms of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cognitive processes (Bandura, 1977; Weiner,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1972), the informational and motivational ef-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fects of arousal are treated as interdependent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rather than as separate events. We shall re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: turn to this issue later when we consider the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: differential predictions made from social learn-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing theory and from the dual-process theory of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: avoidance behavior concerning the behavioral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effects of extinguishing anxiety arousal.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As will be recalled from the earlier dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cussion, desensitization and massive exposure

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatments aimed at extinguishing anxiety

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arousal produce some reductions in avoidance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior. Anxiety arousal to threats is like-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: wise diminished by modeling, and is even

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: more thoroughly eliminated by experienced

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mastery achieved through participant model-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing (Bandura & Barab, 1973; Bandura et

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: al., 1969; Blanchard, 1970a). Modeling ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proaches have other advantages for enhancing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy and thereby removing dysfunc-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tional fears. In addition to diminishing prone-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ness to aversive arousal, such approaches also

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: teach effective coping skills by demonstrating

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proficient ways of handling threatening situa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions. The latter contribution is especially im-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: portant when fear arousal partly results from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral deficits. It is often the case that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fears and deficits are interdependent. Avoid-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ance of stressful activities impedes develop-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment of coping skills, and the resulting lack

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of competency provides a realistic basis for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fear. Acquiring behavioral means for con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trolling potential threats attenuates or elim-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: inates fear arousal (Averill, 1973; Notter-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: man, Schoenfeld, & Bersh, 1952; Szpiler &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Epstein, 1976). Behavioral control not only

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: allows one to manage the aversive aspects of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: an environment. It also affects how the en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vironment is likely to be perceived. Poten-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tially stressful situations that can be con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trolled are construed as less threatening,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and such cognitive appraisals further re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duce anticipatory emotional arousal (Averill,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Researchers working within the attribu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tional framework have attempted to modify

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: avoidance behavior by directly manipulating

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the cognitive labeling of emotional arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Valins & Nisbett, 1971). The presumption

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is that if phobics are led to believe that the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: things they have previously feared no longer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: affect them internally, the cognitive reevalua-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion alone will reduce avoidance behavior. In

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatment analogues of this approach, pho-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: bics receive false physiological feedback sug-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: gesting that they are no longer emotionally

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: upset by threatening events. Results of this

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: procedure are essentially negative. Early

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: claims that erroneous arousal feedback re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duces avoidance behavior (Valins & Ray,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1967) are disputed by methodologically

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: superior studies showing that false feedback

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of physiological tranquility in the presence

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of threats has either no appreciable effect

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on subsequent fearful behavior (Gaupp,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Stern, & Galbraith, 1972; Howlett & Nawas,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1971; Kent, Wilson, & Nelson, 1972; Rosen,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Rosen, & Reid, 1972; Sushinsky & Bootzin,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Moreover, mislabeling arousal or attributing

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: it to erroneous sources is unlikely to be of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: much help to the highly anxious. Severe

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: acrophobics, for example, may be temporarily

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: misled into believing that they no longer

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fear high elevations, but they will reexperi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ence unnerving internal feedback when con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fronted with dreaded heights. It should also

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: be noted that in attributional explanations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the success of behavioral treatments the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: heavy emphasis on physiological arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: derives more from speculations about the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nature of emotion (Schachter, 1964) than

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from evidence that arousal is a major deter-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: minant of defensive behavior.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1970), or produces minor changes under

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: such limited conditions as to be of little

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: practical consequence (Borkovec, 1973).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Cognitive Processing of Efficacy Information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The corrective value of information derived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from successful performance can be at-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tenuated in several ways. The first involves

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: discrimination processes. The consequences

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: individuals anticipate were they to perform

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: feared activities differ in circumstances which

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vary in safeguards. As a result, they may

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behave boldly in situations signifying safety,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: but retain unchanged their self-doubts under

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: less secure conditions. Such mitigative dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: criminations can extend to the treatments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Misattribution of emotional arousal is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: another variant of the attributional ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proach to modification of fearful behavior.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The strategy here is to lead fearful people

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into believing that their emotional arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is caused by a nonemotional source. To the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: extent that they no longer label their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: agitated state as anxiety, they will behave

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: more boldly. It may be possible to reduce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mild fears by this means (Ross, Rodin, &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Zimbardo, 1969), but the highly anxious are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not easily led into misattributing their anxiety

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to irrelevant sources (Nisbett & Schachter,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1966). When evaluated systematically, mis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: attribution treatments do not produce sig-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nificant changes in chronic anxiety condi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions (Singerman, Borkovec, & Baron, 1976),

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and some of the benefits reported with other

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dysfunctions cannot be replicated (Bootzin,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Herman, & Nicassio, 1976; Kellogg & Baron,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1975). There is also some suggestive evidence

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that in laboratory studies the attenuation of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fear may be due more to the veridicality of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arousal information than to misattribution of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fear arousal to an innocuous source (Calvert-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Boyanowsky & Leventhal, 1975).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Any reduction in fear resulting from de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ceptive feedback is apt to be short-lived
