layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: because illusory assurances are not an espe-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cially reliable way of creating durable self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations. However, more veritable ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periences that reduce the level of emotional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arousal can set in motion a reciprocal process

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of change. In the social learning view, po-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tential threats activate fear largely through

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cognitive self-arousal (Bandura, 1969, 1977).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Perceived self-competence can therefore af-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fect susceptibility to self-arousal. Individuals

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: who come to believe that they are less vulner-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: able than they previously assumed are less

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: prone to generate frightening thoughts in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threatening situations. Those whose fears

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are relatively weak may reduce their self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: doubts and debilitating self-arousal to the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: point where they perform successfully. Per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance successes, in turn, strengthen self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. Such changes can, of course, be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reliably achieved without resort to ruses.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The discussion thus far has centered pri-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: marily on the many sources of information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: enactive, vicarious, exhortative, and emotive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: --that people use to judge their level of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy. At this point a distinction must

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: be drawn between information contained in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: environmental events and information as

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: processed and transformed by the individual.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The impact of information on efficacy ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations will depend on how it is cognitively

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: appraised. A number of contextual factors,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: including the social, situational, and temporal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: circumstances under which events occur, enter

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into such appraisals. For this reason, even

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: success experiences do not necessarily create

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: strong generalized expectations of personal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. Expectations that have served self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: protective functions for years are not quickly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: discarded. When experience contradicts firmly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: established expectations of self-efficacy, they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: may undergo little change if the conditions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of performance are such as to lead one to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: discount the import of the experience.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the chances that behavior will be ascribed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to external factors (Bem, 1972; Weiner,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Cognitive appraisals of the causes of one's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior, which have been examined exten-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sively in investigations of self-attributional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: processes (Bem, 1972), can similarly delimit

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: gains in self-efficacy from behavioral attain-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ments. It was previously shown that at-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tributions of affect and actions to illusory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: competence have little, if any, effect on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: refractory behavior. This does not, of course,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mean that causal appraisals are of limited

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: importance in the process of behavior change.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Quite the contrary, performance attainment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is a prominent source of efficacy information,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: but it is by no means unambiguous. As al-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ready mentioned briefly, people can gain com-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: petence through authentic means but, be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cause of faulty appraisals of the circum-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stances under which they improve, will credit

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their achievements to external factors rather

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: than to their own capabilities. Here the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: problem is one of inaccurate ascription of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: personal competency to situational factors.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Successes are more likely to enhance self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy if performances are perceived as

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: resulting from skill than from fortuitous or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: special external aids. Conversely, failures

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: would be expected to produce greater reduc-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions in self-efficacy when attributed to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ability rather than to unusual situational

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: circumstances. The more extensive the situa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tional aids for performance, the greater are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves, as well as to the situational cir-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cumstances in which behavioral attainments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: occur. This is especially true of treatments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relying solely on symbolic and vicarious ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perience. Achieving reductions in fear to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threats presented symbolically is unlikely to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: enhance perceived self-efficacy to any great

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: extent in people who believe that success in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: imagery does not portend accomplishments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in reality. Information conveyed by facilely

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modeled performances might likewise be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: minimized by anxious observers on the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: grounds that the models possess special

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expertise enabling them to prevent injurious

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: consequences that might otherwise befall the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: unskilled. Because such discriminations, even

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: though objectively mistaken, impede change

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in self-efficacy, observers will be reluctant to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: attempt feared activities and will be easily

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dissuaded by negative experience.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Even under conditions of perceived self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: determination of outcomes, the impact of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance attainments on self-efficacy will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vary depending on whether one's accomplish-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ments are ascribed mainly to ability or to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effort. Success with minimal effort fosters

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ability ascriptions that reinforce a strong

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sense of self-efficacy. By contrast, analogous

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: successes achieved through high expenditure

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of effort connote a lesser ability and are thus

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: likely to have a weaker effect on perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy. Cognitive appraisals of the dif-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ficulty level of the tasks will further affect the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: impact of performance accomplishments on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perceived self-efficacy. To succeed at easy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tasks provides no new information for alter-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing one's sense of self-efficacy, whereas mas-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tery of challenging tasks conveys salient evi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dence of enhanced competence. The rate and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pattern of attainments furnish additional in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formation for judging personal efficacy. Thus,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: people who experience setbacks but detect

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relative progress will raise their perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy more than those who succeed but see

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their performances leveling off compared to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their prior rate of improvement.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Extrapolations from theories about attribu-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion and self-perception to the field of be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havioral change often imply that people must

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: labor unaided or under inconspicuously ar-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ranged influences if they are to convince

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves of their personal competence

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Kopel & Arkowitz, 1975). Such prescrip-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions are open to question on both con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ceptual and empirical grounds. Cognitive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: misappraisals that attenuate the impact of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: disconfirming experiences can be minimized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: without sacrificing the substantial benefits

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of powerful induction procedures. This is

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: achieved by providing opportunities for self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: directed accomplishments after the desired

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior has been established. Any lingering

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: doubts people might have, either about their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capabilities or about probable response con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sequences under unprotected conditions, are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dispelled easily in this manner (Bandura

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: et al., 1975). The more varied the circum-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: stances in which threats are mastered in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Just as the value of efficacy information

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generated enactively and vicariously depends

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on cognitive appraisal, so does the informa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion arising from exhortative and emotive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sources. The impact of verbal persuasion on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy may vary substantially depend-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing on the perceived credibility of the per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: suaders, their prestige, trustworthiness, ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pertise, and assuredness. The more believable

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the source of the information, the more

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: likely are efficacy expectations to change.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The influence of credibility on attitudinal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: change has, of course, received intensive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: study. But its effects on perceived self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: remain to be investigated.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: People judge their physiological arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: largely on the basis of their appraisal of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: instigating conditions. Thus, visceral arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: occurring in situations perceived to be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threatening is interpreted as fear, arousal in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: thwarting situations is experienced as anger,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and that resulting from irretrievable loss of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: valued objects as sorrow (Hunt, Cole, &

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Reis, 1958). Even the same source of phys-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: iological arousal may be interpreted differently

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in ambiguous situations depending on the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: emotional reactions of others in the same

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: setting (Mandler, 1975; Schachter & Singer,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: When tasks are performed in ambiguous or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: complex situations in which there is a variety

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of evocative stimuli, the informational value

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the resultant arousal will depend on the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: meaning imposed upon it. People who per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ceive their arousal as stemming from personal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: inadequacies are more likely to lower their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy expectations than those who attribute

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their arousal to certain situational factors.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Given a proneness to ascribe arousal to per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sonal deficiencies, the heightened attention to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: internal events can result in reciprocally

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: escalating arousal. Indeed, as Sarason (1976)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: has amply documented, individuals who are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: especially susceptible to anxiety arousal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dependently, the more likely are success ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periences to authenticate personal efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and to impede formation of discriminations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that insulate self-perceptions from disconfirm-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing evidence.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: We have already examined how cognitive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: processing of information conveyed by model-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing might influence the extent to which

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vicarious experience effects changes in self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. Among the especially informative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: elements are the models' characteristics (e.g.,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: adeptness, perseverance, age, expertness), the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: similarity between models and observers, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: difficulty of the performance tasks, the situa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tional arrangements under which the modeled

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: achievements occur, and the diversity of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modeled attainments.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Extensive self-directed performance of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formerly threatening activities under pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: gressively challenging conditions at a time

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: when treatments are usually terminated could

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: also serve to reduce susceptibility to relearn-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing of defensive patterns of behavior. A few

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: negative encounters among many successful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiences that have instilled a strong sense

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of self-efficacy will, at most, establish dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: criminative avoidance of realistic threats, an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effect that has adaptive value. In contrast, if

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: people have limited contact with previously

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: feared objects after treatment, whatever

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations of self-efficacy were instated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: would be weaker and more vulnerable to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: change. Consequently, a few unfavorable

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiences are likely to reestablish defensive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior that generalizes inappropriately.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Results of recent studies support the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: thesis that generalized, lasting changes in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy and behavior can best be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: achieved by participant methods using power-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ful induction procedures initially to develop

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: capabilities, then removing external aids to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: verify personal efficacy, then finally using

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-directed mastery to strengthen and gen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: eralize expectations of personal efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (Bandura et al., 1975). Independent per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance can enhance efficacy expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in several ways: (a) It creates additional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exposure to former threats, which provides

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: participants with further evidence that they

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are no longer aversively aroused by what

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they previously feared. Reduced emotional

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arousal confirms increased coping capabilities.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (b) Self-directed mastery provides opportuni-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ties to perfect coping skills, which lessen

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: personal vulnerability to stress. (c) Indepen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dent performance, if well executed, produces

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: success experiences, which further reinforce

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations of self-competency.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: readily become self-preoccupied with their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perceived inadequacies in the face of dif-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ficulties rather than with the task at hand.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Discrepancies between efficacy expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions and performance are most likely to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arise under conditions in which situational

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and task factors are ambiguous. When per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance requirements are ill-defined, people

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: who underestimate the situational demands

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will display positive discrepancies between

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy and performance attainments;

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: those who overestimate the demands will

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In the social learning analysis, choice be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior and effort expenditure are governed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in part by percepts of self-efficacy rather

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: than by a drive condition. Because efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations are defined and measured in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dependently of performance, they provide

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generality, and persistence of coping be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: an explicit basis for predicting the occurrence,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior, whereas an omnibus motive does

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: not. People will approach, explore, and try

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to deal with situations within their self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perceived capabilities, but they will avoid

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: transactions with stressful aspects of their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: environment they perceive as exceeding their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ability.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Differing Perspectives on Self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The phenomena encompassed by the con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: struct of self-efficacy have been the subject

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of interest in other theories of human be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior. The theoretical perspectives differ,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: however, in how they view the nature and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: origins of personal efficacy and the interven-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing processes by which perceived self-efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: affects behavior. In seeking a motivational

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: explanation of exploratory and manipulative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior, White (1959 postulated an "effec-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tance motive," which is conceptualized as an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: intrinsic drive for transactions with the en-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vironment. Unlike instigators arising from

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tissue deficits, effectance motivation is be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lieved to be aroused by novel stimulation

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and is sustained when the resultant inquisi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tive and exploratory actions produce further

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: elements of novelty in the stimulus field.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The effectance motive presumably develops

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through cumulative acquisition of knowledge

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and skills in dealing with the environment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: However, the process by which an effectance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: motive emerges from effective transactions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with the environment is not spelled out in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: White's theory. Nor is the existence of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: motive easy to verify, because effectance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: motivation is inferred from the exploratory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior it supposedly causes. Without an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: independent measure of motive strength one

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cannot tell whether people explore and manip-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ulate things because of a competence motive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to do so, or for any number of other reasons.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Athough the theory of effectance motivation

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: has not been formulated in sufficient detail

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to permit extensive theoretical comparisons,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: there are several issues on which the social

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: learning and effectance theories clearly differ.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The alternative views also differ on the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: origins of efficacy. Within the framework of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effectance theory, the effectance drive de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: velops gradually through prolonged trans-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions with one's surroundings. This theory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: thus focuses almost exclusively on the effects

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produced by one's own actions. In the social

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: learning theory, self-efficacy is conceptualized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as arising from diverse sources of informa-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion conveyed by direct and mediated ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perience. These differences in theoretical ap-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proach have significant implications for how

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one goes about studying the role of perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy in motivational and behavioral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: processes. Expectations of personal efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: do not operate as dispositional determinants

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: independently of contextual factors. Some

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: situations require greater skill and more

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: arduous performances and carry higher risk

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of negative consequences than do others.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Expectations will vary accordingly. Thus, for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: example, the level and strength of perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy in public speaking will differ

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: depending on the subject matter, the format

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the presentation, and the types of audi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ences that will be addressed. The social

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: learning approach is therefore based on a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: microanalysis of perceived coping capabilities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rather than on global personality traits or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: motives of effectance. From this perspective,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: it is no more informative to speak of self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy in general terms than to speak of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: nonspecific approach behavior. To elucidate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: how perceived self-efficacy affects behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: requires a microanalysis of both factors.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exhibit negative discrepancies. Therefore, in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: testing predictions from the conceptual

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: scheme presented here it is important that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subjects understand what kind of behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will be required and the circumstances in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: which they will be asked to perform them.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Moreover, performances and the correspond-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing efficacy expectations should be analyzed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: into separate activities, and preferably

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ordered by level of difficulty. In this type

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of microanalysis both the effcacy expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions and the corresponding behaviors are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: measured in terms of explicit types of per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formances rather than on the basis of global

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: indices.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The social learning determinants of self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy can be varied systematically and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their effects measured. Hence, propositions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: concerning the origins of self-efficacy are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: verifiable with some precision. A slowly de-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Another dimension on which the alternative

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: produce the phenomena they purport to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: explain. As we shall see later, there are more

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: diverse, expeditious, and powerful ways of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: creating self-efficacy than by relying solely

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: veloping motive, however, does not easily

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: lend itself to being tested experimentally.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: theories might be judged is their power to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on novel stimulation arising from exploratory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ency to perceive events as being either per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: sonally or externally determined.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The theoretical framework presented in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: present article is generalizable beyond the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: psychotherapy domain to other psychological

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: phenomena involving behavioral choices and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: regulation of effort in activities that can have

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: adverse effects. For example, the theory of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: learned helplessness advanced by Maier and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Seligman (1976) assumes that as a result of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: being subjected to uncontrollable aversive

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: events, organisms acquire expectancies that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they come to expect future responding to be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: futile, they no longer initiate behavior in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectancies.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions do not affect outcomes. Because

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: situations where outcomes are in fact con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trollable by responses. Although this theory

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: posits an expectancy mechanism of operation,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: it focuses exclusively on response-outcome

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contemporary psychological thought (Bolles,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: With the ascendency of cognitive views of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavior, the concept of expectancy is as-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: suming an increasingly prominent place in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1972b; Heneman, & Schwab, 1972; Irwin,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1971). However, virtually all of the theoriz-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing and experimentation has focused on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: action-outcome expectations. The ideas ad-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vanced in some of the theories nevertheless

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: bear some likeness to the notion of self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. According to the theory of person-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ality proposed by Rotter (1966), behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: varies as a function of generalized expect-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ancies that outcomes are determined by one's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions or by external forces beyond one's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: control. Such expectations about the instru-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mentality of behavior are considered to be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: largely a product of one's history of reinforce-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment. Much of the research within this tradi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tion is concerned with the behavioral cor-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: relates of individual differences in the tend-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Theorizing and experimentation on learned

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ceptual distinction between efficacy and out-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: helplessness might well consider the con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: come expectations. People can give up trying

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: because they lack a sense of efficacy in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: achieving the required behavior, or they may

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: be assured of their capabilities but give up

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The notion of locus of control is often

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treated in the literature as analogous to self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy. However, Rotter's (1966) conceptual

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: scheme is primarily concerned with causal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: beliefs about action-outcome contingencies

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rather than with personal efficacy. Perceived

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy and beliefs about the locus of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: causality must be distinguished, because con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: victions that outcomes are determined by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: one's own actions can have any number of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: effects on self-efficacy and behavior. People

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: who regard outcomes as personally determined

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: but who lack the requisite skills would ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perience low self-efficacy and view activities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with a sense of futility. Thus, for example,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a child who fails to grasp arithmetic concepts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and expects course grades to be dependent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: entirely on skill in the subject matter has

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: every reason to be demoralized. While causal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: beliefs and self-efficacy refer to different

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: phenomena, as we have already noted, causal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ascriptions of behavior to skill or to chance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: can mediate the effects of performance at-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tainments on self-efficacy.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trying because they expect their behavior to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: have no effect on an unresponsive environ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment or to be consistently punished. These

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: two separable expectancy sources of futility

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: have quite different antecedents and remedial

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: implications. To alter efficacy-based futility

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: requires development of competencies and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations of personal effectiveness. By

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: contrast, to change outcome-based futility

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: necessitates changes in prevailing environ-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mental contingencies that restore the in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: strumental value of the competencies that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: people already possess.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subjects receiving the modeling treatment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: merely observed the therapist perform the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: same activities for an equivalent period.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: These subjects did not engage in any behavior

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves, and consequently they had no

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance sources of information for their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy expectations. Enactive and vicarious

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: procedures were selected for study to assess

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the predictive value of self-efficacy created

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by quite different modes of treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Microanalysis of Self-eficacy and Behavioral

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Change

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: To test derivations from the social learn-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing analysis of the process of change, an

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: experiment was conducted wherein severe

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: phobics received treatments designed to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: create differential levels of efficacy expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions, and then the relationship between self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy and behavioral change was analyzed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in detail (Bandura et al., in press). The ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periment proceeded as follows. Adult snake

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: phobics, whose phobias affected their lives ad-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: versely, were administered for equivalent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periods either participant modeling, model-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ing alone, or no treatment. In participant

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: modeling, which operates through direct

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: mastery experiences, subjects were assisted,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by whatever induction aids were needed, to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: engage in progressively more threatening in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: teractions with a boa constrictor. After com-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pleting all the therapeutic tasks, which in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cluded holding the snake, placing open hands

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in front of its head as it moved about the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: room, holding the snake in front of their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: faces, and allowing it to crawl freely in their

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: laps, the subjects engaged in a brief period

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of self-directed mastery. In the present ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: periment, the modeling aid was used only

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: briefly if needed to help initiate performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in order to minimize overlap of this element

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in the two modes of treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The level, strength, and generality of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: subjects' efficacy expectations were measured

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: at critical junctures in the change process.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subjects privately designated, on a list of 18

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance tasks ranked in order of in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: creasing threat, those tasks they considered

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves capable of executing. They then

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rated the strength of their expectations for

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: each of these tasks on a 100-point probability

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: scale ranging, in 10-unit intervals, from great

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: uncertainty, through intermediate values of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: certainty, to complete certainty. They rated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: their efficacy expectations for coping with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: snakes of the same variety used in treatment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: as well as dissimilar snakes to measure the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generality of their efficacy expectations.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: These measures were obtained prior to treat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment, following treatment but before the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral posttest, and after completing the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: posttest. Approach behavior was assessed in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the posttest by a series of performance tasks

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: requiring increasingly more threatening inter-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: actions with a different type of boa constrictor

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from the one used in treatment and with a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: corn snake of markedly different appearance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: but equivalent threat value. Different phobic

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: objects were used to provide a test of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: generalized effects of changes in efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations along a dimension of similarity

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to the threat used in treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Consistent with the social learning analysis

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the sources of self-efficacy, experiences

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: based on performance accomplishments pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duced higher, more generalized, and stronger

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy expectations than did vicarious ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perience, which in turn exceeded those in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the control condition. Figure 3 summarizes

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the level of efficacy expectations and per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance as a function of treatment condi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subjects assigned to the control condition

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: participated in the assessment procedures

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: without receiving any intervening treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Following completion of the posttest, the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: controls and those in the modeling condition

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: who failed to achieve terminal performances

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: received the participant modeling treatment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ALBERT BANDURA

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Although the enactive and vicarious treat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ments differed in their power to enhance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy, the efficacy expectations were

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: equally predictive of subsequent performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: irrespective of how they were instated. The

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: higher the level of perceived self-efficacy at

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the completion of treatment the higher was

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the level of approach behavior for efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations instated enactively (r = .83) and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vicariously (r = .84). It might be noted here

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that all subjects had at their disposal the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: component responses for producing the inter-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: active patterns of behavior, and they all had

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: some incentive to overcome their phobic be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: havior. Under conditions in which people

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: differ substantially in component capabilities

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and motivation, skill and incentive factors

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will also contribute to variance in perform-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ance.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Correlation coefficients based on aggregate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: measures do not fully reveal the degree of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: correspondence between self-efficacy and per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formance on the specific behavioral tasks

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from which the aggregate scores are obtained.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A subject can display an equivalent number

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of efficacy expectations and successful per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formances, but they might not correspond

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: entirely to the same tasks. The most precise

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: index of the relationship is provided by a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: microanalysis of the congruence between self-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy and performance at the level of in-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dividual tasks. This measure was obtained by

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: recording whether or not subjects considered

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: themselves capable of performing each of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the various tasks at the end of treatment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and by computing the percentage of accurate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: correspondence between efficacy judgment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and actual performance. Self-efficacy was a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: uniformly accurate predictor of performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: on tasks varying in difficulty with different

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: threats regardless of whether the changes in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: self-efficacy were produced through perform-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ance accomplishments (89% congruence) or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: by vicarious experience alone (86% con-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: gruence). The degree of congruence between

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: perceived self-efficacy and subsequent behav-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ior is equally high for enactive (82%) and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions at different phases of the experiment.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As shown in the figure, performance change

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: corresponds closely to the magnitude of ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectancy change. The greater the increments

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in self-perceived efficacy, the greater the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: changes in behavior. Similar relationships be-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tween level of self-efficacy and performance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are obtained when the data are considered

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: separately for the two snakes. In accordance

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with prediction, participant modeling pro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: duced the more generalized increases in effi-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cacy expectations and the more generalized

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: behavioral changes.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Figure 3. Level of efficacy expectations and approach behavior displayed by subjects toward threats

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: after receiving vicarious or enactive treatments, or no treatment (Bandura et al., in press).

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: vicarious (79%) treatments when the micro-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tasks that subjects had never performed in the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In brief, the theory systematizes a variety

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of findings. As the preceding results show, it

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In the preceding analysis efficacy expecta-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tions were considered without regard to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: strength. A weak sense of self-efficacy thus

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: received the same weight as one reflecting

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: complete certitude. However, the intensity

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and persistence of effort, and hence level of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance, should be higher with strong

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: than with weak self-efficacy. The likelihood

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that a task will be performed as a function

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of the strength of the corresponding efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectation therefore provides a further re-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: finement in the analysis of the relationship

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: between self-efficacy and performance. The

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: probability of successful performance of any

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: given task as a function of strength of efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations is plotted in Figure 4. Because

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the control subjects performed few responses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and had correspondingly restricted efficacy

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: expectations, their data were plotted after

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: they had received the participant modeling

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatment. In all conditions, the stronger the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: efficacy expectations, the higher was the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: likelihood that a particular task would be

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: successfully completed. The positive relation-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ship between strength of self-efficacy and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: probability of successful performance is vir-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: tually identical for the similar and the dis-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: similar threats.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: SELF-EFFICACY THEORY

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: predicts accurately the magnitude and gen-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: erality of behavioral change for efficacy ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations induced enactively and vicariously.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Moreover, it orders variations in level of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: treatment condition. Subjects who received

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: participant modeling, either as the primary

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or as the supplementary treatment, success-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fully performed all of the behaviors in treat-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: ment that were later assessed in the posttest

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: toward different threats. Although all had

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: rates of predictions made from maximal past

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: performance and from maximal efficacy ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations. It would be predicted from the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: proposed theory that among these successful

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: cacy expectations should attain terminal per-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: formances, whereas those holding lower ex-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: pectations should not. If one predicts that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: those who performed maximally in treatment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: will likewise achieve terminal performances

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: (28%) but high for the dissimilar threat

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: that those who express maximal expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: comparably low for both the similar (21%)

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and the dissimilar (24%) threats. The pre-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dictive superiority of efficacy expectations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: over past performance is significant for total
